empty.title: No AI assistant installed
empty.valueStatement: Without a CLI, MetaMates is only a note vault—/today, /graduate, and AI chat won't work. Install an assistant to unlock the thinking engine as your daily starting point.
empty.step1: Click Install AI assistant and pick Gemini, Claude, or CodeBuddy
empty.step2: Follow the installer; sign in in the terminal or panel on first use
empty.step3: When done, chat here or run /today to generate today's plan
empty.description: Install and sign in to Gemini, Claude, or CodeBuddy — then start here. This is MetaMates’ main entry.

status.connectionTimeout: Timed out connecting to {{name}} — retry or switch agent
status.chatDbUnavailable: Chat history database is unavailable (native module not loaded). Run npm run rebuild:native and restart — live chat still works, but history will not persist.
status.ready: {{name}} detected — focus the input to connect
status.reconnectHint: Connection lost. Reconnect or switch to another agent.
status.quotaExceededDetail:
⚠️ {{agent}} returned an error: {{error}}

Switch to another agent, or check this CLI's API key / plan status.
status.geminiModelDailyQuota: {{agent}} daily limit reached for the current model
status.geminiModelDailyQuotaDetail:
⚠️ {{agent}} reported: {{error}}

This usually means the **selected model** hit its daily free cap — not that your API key balance is empty. Switch to Auto or another model in the picker, or verify in a terminal with `gemini`.
status.networkErrorDetail:
⚠️ {{agent}} could not complete the request: {{error}}

Check network, proxy, or firewall; compare by running the CLI directly in a terminal.
status.planExpiredDetail:
⚠️ {{agent}} subscription or plan expired: {{error}}

Renew the service or switch to another agent.
status.typeWhileConnecting: Type now — we'll connect when you send
status.thinkingVerySlow: {{agent}} is slow ({{seconds}}s) — stop or switch agent

input.attachHint: Type @ for files, drag attachments, or tap the mic for voice (up to {{max}} chars)
input.attachTruncated: Attachment content was truncated to {{max}} chars; ask the agent to Read large files
input.voiceListening: Listening… tap the mic again when done
input.voiceUnsupported: Voice input is not supported here
input.voiceDenied: Microphone access denied — allow it in system settings
input.voiceNetwork: Voice needs network (Electron uses Google online STT). Check connection or type instead.
input.voiceServiceBlocked: Web Speech is blocked in this environment — please type instead
input.voiceCapture: Cannot access microphone — check system permissions
input.voiceStartFailed: Could not start speech recognition — try again later
input.voiceNativeFailed: Windows speech recognition failed — check microphone permissions or system speech components

message.copyFailed: Copy failed — select the text manually

workspace.switched: Switched to workspace {{path}} — loading conversations for this vault…

panel.title: Agent
panel.vaultHint: {{agent}} reads and writes notes in your workspace — results go to files, not just chat.
panel.vaultHintGeneric: Connect AI and chat on the right to read and write workspace files.

messages.intelEnhancing: Agent is deepening the intelligence summary…
messages.intelNeedInput: Paste a URL, path, or text — or @-attach a file

auth.title: CLI authentication
auth.inProgress: Signing in — complete authorization in your browser…
auth.browserHint: If the browser did not open automatically, use the link below:
auth.terminalLoginHint: On Windows: run gemini in PowerShell — your browser should open for Google sign-in.
auth.terminalLoginFailed: Could not open PowerShell login window
auth.deprecatedGoogleLogin: Google personal Code Assist sign-in has changed. Use "Gemini API key" or run gemini in a terminal for first-time login.

permission.title: Tool permission request
permission.toolRequest: Agent wants to run a tool

yoloWarning.title: YOLO mode — auto-approve tools
yoloWarning.body: In this mode MetaMates auto-approves file read/write and command execution without asking each time. Only enable if you trust the current agent and have backed up your vault.
yoloWarning.firstRunBody: MetaMates defaults to YOLO: file writes and commands are auto-approved. Choose "Switch to Default" if you want a prompt for each tool call.

toolCall.outsideWorkspace: This path is outside your Vault — MetaMates cannot open it here: {{path}}
toolCall.outsideWorkspaceHint: ⚠️ Agent wrote outside the Vault (MetaMates only manages your Obsidian workspace): {{path}}

writeback.failedDetail: ⚠️ /{{cmd}} expected writeback to {{paths}}, but no recent update detected: {{detail}}
writeback.detailStaleMtime: File exists but was not updated by this /{{cmd}} run (agent may have replied in chat only)
writeback.detailNoRecentNotes: No recently created or updated notes in folder
